3D.label: 3D
3D.description: When enabled, applies a brightness gradient across each spiral arm to simulate a 3D shading effect, making the arms appear rounded.

blend.label: Blend
blend.description: When enabled, blends all palette colors vertically across each spiral arm instead of using distinct per-arm colors.

count.label: Palette Rep
count.description: Number of times the full color palette is repeated across the spirals. Higher values create more spiral arms by duplicating the palette pattern.

grow.label: Grow
grow.description: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually increase in thickness over the effect duration.

movement.label: Movement
movement.description: Speed and direction of the spiral rotation. Positive values rotate in one direction, negative in the other. Zero keeps the spirals stationary.

rotation.label: Spiral Wraps
rotation.description: Number of times each spiral arm wraps around the model from bottom to top. Negative values reverse the wrap direction. Larger absolute values produce tighter spirals.

shrink.label: Shrink
shrink.description: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually decrease in thickness over the effect duration. When both Grow and Shrink are enabled, the arms grow then shrink.

thickness.label: Thickness
thickness.description: Width of each spiral arm as a percentage of the available space. At 100% the arms fill the entire model with no gaps between them.

registryDefinition.notes: Geometry-sensitive motion effect. Especially high value on tree profiles where count, movement, rotation, and thickness interact with spiral-capable model forms.
